---
title: "The Rev. Oliver Walford"
---

## The Rev. Oliver Walford

**Dates:** (1814- 3 April 1855)

### Description

housemaster at Charterhouse

### Biography

He married (1846 ) Isabella Margaret Saunders, [Parish, <i>List of Carthusians</i> R. L Arrowsmith, <i>Charterhouse Register (1769-1872</i>) 1974]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
